name: Hot Milk Sponge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease a 9x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour and baking powder with 1/4 teaspoon of salt.
4. In a small mixing bowl, beat the eggs at high speed for 2 minutes or until thick.
5. Gradually add sugar to the eggs and beat at medium speed for 4 to 5 minutes or until the sugar dissolves.
6. Add the dry ingredients to the egg mixture and stir just until combined.
7. Heat the milk with butter until the butter melts, then stir into the batter and mix well.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
10. Frost while warm. Serves 9.  Broiled topping can be made separately or use your choice of toppings.
